cartoons.image_alt: A nervouslooking person talks to a sympatheticlooking person.
cartoons.caption: "What if it’s allergies, and a cold, and I’m a hypochondriac?"
cartoons.author: Maggie Larson
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Monday, April 20th

humor_links.title: Potential slogans for J. D. Vance’s 2028 Presidential campaign.

A day in my highly optimized, convenient life.
When to go to the hospital for childbirth.
